languages.text: "Не подобает терять лицо в присутствии слуг, наследни{mf|к|ца}. Приказ привести Янус к покорности отдал я, ибо этот мир нуждался в твердой руке Вольного Торговца".

traits.locale_text: "Не подобает терять лицо в присутствии слуг, наследни{mf|к|ца}. Приказ привести Янус к покорности отдал я, ибо этот мир нуждался в твердой руке Вольного Торговца".
traits.speaker: DLC3_DL_SeberianVonValancius

languages.text: "It does not befit one to lose face in the presence of servants, my heir. The order to bring Janus to heel was issued by me, for that world required the Rogue Trader's firm hand."
languages.original_text: "Не подобает терять лицо в присутствии слуг, наследни{mf|к|ца}. Приказ привести Янус к покорности отдал я, ибо этот мир нуждался в твердой руке Вольного Торговца".

traits.locale_text: "It does not befit one to lose face in the presence of servants, heir. The order to bring Janus to heel was issued by me, for that world required the Rogue Trader's firm hand."
"It does not befit one to lose face in the presence of servants, heir. The order to bring Janus to heel was issued by me, for that world required the Rogue Trader's firm hand."
"It does not befit one to lose face in the presence of servants, heir. The order to bring Janus to heel was issued by me, for that world required the Rogue Trader's firm hand."
"It does not befit one to lose face in the presence of servants, my heir. The order to bring Janus to heel was issued by me, for that world required the Rogue Trader's firm hand."

languages.text: «No es decoroso perder los estribos delante de la servidumbre, {mf|heredero|heredera}. Fui yo quien impartió la orden de someter Janus, pues la situación requería la mano firme de un Comerciante Independiente».
languages.original_text: "It does not befit one to lose face in the presence of servants, my heir. The order to bring Janus to heel was issued by me, for that world required the Rogue Trader's firm hand."

traits.locale_text: «No es decoroso perder los estribos delante de la servidumbre, {mf|heredero|heredera}. Fui yo quien impartió la orden de someter Janus, pues la situación requería la mano firme de un Comerciante Independiente».

languages.text: “在仆从面前失态，可不体面，我的继承人。是我下令镇压加努斯的。那个世界需要行商浪人的铁腕统治。”
languages.original_text: "It does not befit one to lose face in the presence of servants, my heir. The order to bring Janus to heel was issued by me, for that world required the Rogue Trader's firm hand."

traits.locale_text: “在仆从面前失态，可不体面，我的继承人。是我下令镇压加努斯的。那个世界需要行商浪人的铁腕统治。”

languages.text: « Perdre contenance en présence de serviteurs est indigne de votre condition, {mf|héritier|héritière}. C'est moi qui ai donné l'ordre de mater les rebelles de Janus, et pour cause, ce monde avait grand besoin de la poigne de fer du libre-marchand. »
languages.original_text: "It does not befit one to lose face in the presence of servants, my heir. The order to bring Janus to heel was issued by me, for that world required the Rogue Trader's firm hand."

traits.locale_text: « Perdre contenance en présence de serviteurs est indigne de votre condition, {mf|héritier|héritière}. C'est moi qui ai donné l'ordre de mater les rebelles de Janus, et pour cause, ce monde avait grand besoin de la poigne de fer du libre-marchand. »

languages.text: "Hizmetkârların önünde küçük düşmek insana yakışmaz vârisim. Janus'u dize getirme emrini ben verdim. O dünyanın hizaya getirilmeye ihtiyacı vardı."
languages.original_text: "It does not befit one to lose face in the presence of servants, my heir. The order to bring Janus to heel was issued by me, for that world required the Rogue Trader's firm hand."

traits.locale_text: "Hizmetkârların önünde küçük düşmek insana yakışmaz vârisim. Janus'u dize getirme emrini ben verdim. O dünyanın hizaya getirilmeye ihtiyacı vardı."

languages.text: 「家臣の前で恥をかくとは、お前にはふさわしくない。ジャヌスを従わせる命令は、私が下した。その世界には、ローグトレーダーの強硬な手が必要だったのだ。」
languages.original_text: "It does not befit one to lose face in the presence of servants, my heir. The order to bring Janus to heel was issued by me, for that world required the Rogue Trader's firm hand."

traits.locale_text: 「家臣の前で恥をかくとは、お前にはふさわしくない。ジャヌスを従わせる命令は、私が下した。その世界には、ローグトレーダーの強硬な手が必要だったのだ。」

languages.text: "Es ist nicht vorteilhaft, in Gegenwart von Dienern das Gesicht zu verlieren, {mf|Erbe|Erbin}. Der Befehl, Janus gefügig zu machen, kam von mir, denn diese Welt bedurfte der harten Hand des Freihändlers."
languages.original_text: "It does not befit one to lose face in the presence of servants, heir. The order to bring Janus to heel was issued by me, for that world required the Rogue Trader's firm hand."

traits.locale_text: "Es ist nicht vorteilhaft, in Gegenwart von Dienern das Gesicht zu verlieren, {mf|Erbe|Erbin}. Der Befehl, Janus gefügig zu machen, kam von mir, denn diese Welt bedurfte der harten Hand des Freihändlers."
